overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} W = \oint_{C} \mathbf{F} \cdot d\mathbf{r} = \oint_{C} \left(e^{x} - y^{3}\right) dx + (\cos y + x^{3}) dy \\ = \iint_{R} \left[ \frac{\partial}{\partial x}(\cos y + x^{3}) - \frac{\partial}{\partial y}(e^{x} - y^{3}) \right] dA \\ = \iint_{R} (3x^{2} + 3y^{2}) dA = 3 \iint_{R} (x^{2} + y^{2}) dA \\ = 3 \int_{0}^{2\pi} \int_{0}^{1} (r^{2}) r\,dr\,d\theta = \frac{3}{4} \int_{0}^{2\pi} d\theta = \frac{3\pi}{2} \\ \end{array}
